node -e "const K='sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH',H={apikey:K,Authorization:'Bearer '+K};(async()=>{const B='http://127.0.0.1:54321/rest/v1';const a=await (await fetch(B+'/image_analyses?select=punto_id,image_urls,image_url&limit=40',{headers:H})).json();const pids=new Set(a.map(x=>x.punto_id).filter(Boolean));console.log('image_analyses rows:',a.length,'| distinct punto_id:',pids.size);console.log('sample punto_ids:',[...pids].slice(0,5).join(', '));console.log('rows with image_urls length>1:',a.filter(x=>Array.isArray(x.image_urls)&&x.image_urls.length>1).length);console.log('rows with null punto_id:',a.filter(x=>!x.punto_id).length);const puntos=await (await fetch(B+'/puntos_ferroviarios?select=id',{headers:H})).json();const existIds=new Set(puntos.map(p=>p.id));const orphan=[...pids].filter(id=>!existIds.has(id));console.log('total puntos_ferroviarios:',puntos.length,'| orphan analyses whose punto is gone:',orphan.length)})()"

import os, sys, openpyxl
sys.path.insert(0, r"C:\Users\YOGA-01\Documents\Frontend\server")
import croquis_com as cc

d = r"C:\Users\YOGA-01\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\punto_test"
# crear xlsx de prueba: B1=1042.5 (X), C1=3318.0 (Y), otras celdas con basura
wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active
ws["A1"] = 1
ws["B1"] = 1042.5
ws["C1"] = 3318.0
ws["D1"] = 100.0
wb.save(os.path.join(d, "123_Norte_2024-05-01.xlsx")); wb.close()

# caso 1: xlsx valido
xy = cc._leer_centro(d)
assert xy == (1042.5, 3318.0), f"fallo caso valido: {xy}"
print(f"OK valido: {xy}")

# caso 2: carpeta sin xlsx -> None
vacio = os.path.join(d, "vacio"); os.makedirs(vacio, exist_ok=True)
assert cc._leer_centro(vacio) is None, "debia ser None sin xlsx"
print("OK vacio: None")

# caso 3: B1/C1 no numericas -> None
wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active
ws["A1"] = 1; ws["B1"] = "este"; ws["C1"] = "oeste"
wb.save(os.path.join(vacio, "bad.xlsx")); wb.close()
assert cc._leer_centro(vacio) is None, "debia ser None con texto en B1/C1"
print("OK no-numerico: None")
print("TODOS LOS CASOS OK")
